description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of peep toe sandals from enroute. Pair it with any kind of western and ethnic wear, and look great both ways.This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.Heel: 3"UpperPatent leather forefoot straps with white piping and a bow Leather footbed with a patent leather patch at the toe regionOutsoleDurable TPU outsole grooved on the forefoot and has a grooved rubber heel patch for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
